query: GTA 6 Online multiplayer mode launch availability official confirmation Rockstar

{"query":"GTA 6 Online multiplayer mode launch availability official confirmation Rockstar","model":"mako","response_time_ms":789,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/","title":"Grand Theft Auto VI - Rockstar Games","content":"PlayStation 5Xbox Series X|S
Jason and Lucia have always known the deck is stacked against them.
But when an easy score goes wrong, they find themselves on the darkest side of the sunniest place in America, in the middle of a criminal conspiracy stretching across the state of Leonida — forced to rely on each other more than ever if they want to make it out alive.
Download and share official videos, screenshots, and more."},{"url":"https://games.gg/grand-theft-auto-vi/guides/does-gta-6-have-multiplayer-at-launch/","title":"Does GTA 6 Have Multiplayer at Launch? | GAMES.GG","content":"Here's what that means and when multiplayer could arrive.
Grand Theft Auto 6 is almost here, and the hype around Vice City's return is enormous.
Rockstar has confirmed that GTA 6 launches as a strictly single-player experience.
There is no online mode shipping with the game, and Rockstar has made no announcement about a multiplayer component arriving on day one.
That confirmation caught a lot of players off guard.
That's not happening here, at least not immediately.
The focus at launch sits entirely on Jason and Lucia, the two protagonists at the center of the story.
Look at how the last two major Rockstar releases played out.
GTA 5 launched in September 2013 as a single-player game, with GTA Online following roughly two weeks later as a free update.
Rockstar hasn't said a word about how a GTA 6 online mode would be structured, so anything specific here would be speculation.
What the sources confirm is that three possible delivery methods have been floated in the broader conversation: paid DLC, a standalone release, or a free update attached to the base game.
No release window for any GTA 6 multiplayer mode has been confirmed.
Treat any specific dates or details circulating online as unverified until Rockstar makes an official announcement.
Vice City is back, the dual-protagonist setup with Jason and Lucia adds a new storytelling angle, and Rockstar has had over a decade of GTA 5 feedback to inform how they've built this world.
Pre-orders open June 25 on PS5 and Xbox Series X|S, so there's not much time left to sort that out.
There's also more news dropping around the same time."},{"url":"https://www.rockstargames.com/newswire/article/5171972o3ak5oa/pre-order-grand-theft-auto-vi-on-june-25","title":"Pre-Order Grand Theft Auto VI on June 25","content":"Jun 24, 2026 — Grand Theft Auto VI.
